title: lastrea engleriana
intro: Lastrea engleriana, also known as the Engler's lady fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Lastrea engleriana is commonly prepared in herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
